danger-hover.$description: Lighter than danger, restoring the usual dark-mode 'brighten on hover' direction (Phase 4 OKLCH regen, 2026-07-18) now that text.on-danger is gray.950 in dark mode: gray.950 on red.400 = 7.44:1. The earlier fix used red.600 (darker) specifically because it paired with white text (3.24:1 on red.400 failed then) — that constraint no longer applies now that on-danger is theme-specific.

neutral.$description: Fifth status-tone fill, for neutral/offline-style indicators (e.g. Avatar's offline status dot). gray.500 on bg.surface: 3.25:1 light / 4.34:1 dark, both pass WCAG 1.4.11 non-text contrast (3:1) — re-verified 2026-07-18 (Phase 4, OKLCH regen), shared across all 4 themes since gray.500 uniquely satisfies both.

neutral-strong.$description: Solid neutral fill for hosting text (Badge's solid variant, neutral tone) — bg.neutral (gray.500) is only verified for the 3:1 non-text case. gray.600 with white text gives 4.70:1, passing everywhere — shared across all 4 themes (re-verified 2026-07-18, Phase 4 OKLCH regen).

tertiary.$description: gray.500 fails AA (needs 4.5:1) for this token's literal-text uses (Text color="tertiary", Divider label, Input placeholder). gray.400 gives 6.08:1 (re-verified 2026-07-18, Phase 4 OKLCH regen), still more muted than text.secondary (gray.300).

on-danger.$description: Text on a solid bg.danger fill. Post-OKLCH-regen (Phase 4, 2026-07-18): dark-theme bg.danger is red.500, where white only gives 3.48:1. gray.950 gives 5.22:1 (and 7.44:1 against danger-hover's red.400) — this token is now theme-specific; light themes keep white (5.10:1 against red.600).

on-info.$description: Text on a solid bg.info fill (Badge solid variant). Post-OKLCH-regen (Phase 4, 2026-07-18): dark-theme bg.info is blue.500, where white only gives 3.26:1. gray.950 gives 5.56:1 — this token is now theme-specific; light themes keep white (4.71:1 against blue.600).

on-success.$description: Text on a solid bg.success fill (Badge solid variant). Dark-theme bg.success is green.500: white fails (3.07:1), gray.950 passes at 5.91:1 (re-verified 2026-07-18, Phase 4 OKLCH regen). Light themes now use white instead — see purple-light.json / emerald-light.json.

on-warning.$description: Text on a solid bg.warning fill (Badge solid variant). Dark-theme bg.warning is amber.500: white fails (3.31:1), gray.950 passes at 5.49:1 (re-verified 2026-07-18, Phase 4 OKLCH regen). Light themes now use white instead — see purple-light.json / emerald-light.json.

on-neutral.$description: Text on a solid bg.neutral-strong fill (Badge solid variant). White on gray.600 = 4.70:1, passes everywhere — shared across all 4 themes (re-verified 2026-07-18, Phase 4 OKLCH regen).
